bird.name: Laysan finch
bird.summary: The Laysan finch (Telespiza cantans), sometimes referred to by its Hawaiian name, ʻekupuʻu, is a species of Hawaiian honeycreeper, that is…

locations.name: 歐胡島
locations.summary: 瓦胡岛 （夏威夷語：Oʻahu，英語：Oahu，/oʊˈɑːhuː/），又譯為欧胡岛，或被称为“聚集之岛”，或“奧雅胡”，是夏威夷群島中面積第三大的島嶼，也是群島中人口最多的島嶼，聚集了夏威夷州总人口的大约三分之二。夏威夷州首府所在地檀香…

relations.subject: Laysan finch
relations.evidence: The fossil record shows that the finch once had a greater range in Hawaii, reaching as far as Oahu, and that birds on Laysan represent a relict population

relations.subject: Laysan finch
relations.evidence: The population is considered stable with the biggest threat being uncontrollable climate change
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
